name: hello-rosa
yaml:
service:
  name: hello-rosa
  identifier: hellorosa
  orgIdentifier: sandbox
  projectIdentifier: soto_sandbox
  serviceDefinition:
    type: Kubernetes
    spec:
      manifests:
        - manifest:
            identifier: k8smanifests
            type: K8sManifest
            spec:
              store:
                type: Github
                spec:
                  connectorRef: alexsotoharness
                  repoName: hellorosa
                  gitFetchType: Branch
                  branch: main
                  paths:
                    - k8s
              skipResourceVersioning: false
      artifacts:
        primary:
          primaryArtifactRef: dockerhub
          sources:
            - identifier: dockerhub
              spec:
                connectorRef: dockerhubalexsotoharness
                imagePath: alexsotoharness/hello-rosa
                tag: <+pipeline.sequenceId>
              type: DockerRegistry
